2025-26 UAB Blazers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 20-12 (11-7, 4th in American MBB)

Coach: Andy Kennedy

PS/G: 79.2 (97th of 365)

PA/G: 73.8 (177th of 365)

SRS: 3.50 (116th of 365)

SOS: -0.31 (142nd of 365)

ORtg: 110.5 (152nd of 365)

DRtg: 102.9 (77th of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +75000
